simraki-cursed-items.CannotUnequip: You cannot unequip a cursed item
simraki-cursed-items.CannotUnattune: You cannot unattune from a cursed item
simraki-cursed-items.CursedItemDescHint: The curse description is located in the "Description" tab
simraki-cursed-items.CursedItemEffectDesc: This effect is shown only after the item is identified and the curse is revealed

ShowUnrevealedCursedEffects.Name: Show unrevealed cursed effects
ShowUnrevealedCursedEffects.Hint: Show effects from both revealed and unrevealed curses

RequireAttunement.Name: Curses require attunement
RequireAttunement.Hint: Does not affect existing curses on items without attunement — they remain active

BlockUnattune.Name: Prevent breaking attunement from cursed items
